# ReineiraOS Docs

> Developer documentation for ReineiraOS — conditional settlement infrastructure with FHE-encrypted Escrows, pluggable Gates, protocol-native Insurance, cross-chain USDC settlement via Circle CCTP, and an operator network. Operated by Reineira Labs Limited (Ras Al Khaimah Digital Assets Oasis, UAE). Currently testnet-only (Arbitrum Sepolia + Fhenix); no mainnet, no token, no real-money custody.

The protocol is fully decentralized open-source software once deployed. Reineira Labs does not operate, control, or administer the protocol. Encryption is performed client-side; decryption keys are held only by the transacting parties.

## Get Started

- [Overview](https://docs.reineira.xyz/get-started/overview): Conditional settlement infrastructure — what it is, who it's for, and why it matters.
- [Quick Start](https://docs.reineira.xyz/get-started/quick-start): Deploy your first Escrow in under 5 minutes.

## Project Status

- [Status & Roadmap](https://docs.reineira.xyz/status): Every protocol component × status × milestone (Live / Chaos-net / Spec'd / Research), derived from the whitepaper Implementation Notes and Open Problems.
- [Risk & Audit Status](https://docs.reineira.xyz/risk): Audit posture, compliance targets, and the limits of the security model — full disclosure.

## Settlement Standard (RSS)

The Reineira Settlement Standard — the open, OSI-aligned conformance spec, separate from any deployment.

- [What is RSS](https://docs.reineira.xyz/settlement-standard/what-is-rss): The conformance spec; the standards-fork rationale.
- [Conformance](https://docs.reineira.xyz/settlement-standard/conformance): The six clauses + the conformance test surface.
- [Interface Surface](https://docs.reineira.xyz/settlement-standard/interface-surface): The four-primitive interfaces — v0.1 mandatory and v0.2 spec'd.
- [Versioning & RIPs](https://docs.reineira.xyz/settlement-standard/versioning): v0.1 → v0.2 → v1.0 and the RIP process (the EIP analog).
- [Licensing](https://docs.reineira.xyz/settlement-standard/licensing): The license split — OSI-aligned standard vs. the BUSL core that converts to Apache 2.0.

## Developer Tools

- [Builder Journey](https://docs.reineira.xyz/developer-tools/builder-journey): The end-to-end flow from venture brief to shipped product.
- [Atlas](https://docs.reineira.xyz/developer-tools/atlas): Startup operating system — strategy, compliance, fundraising, and app scaffolding via 12 collaborating AI agents.
- [Reineira Code](https://docs.reineira.xyz/developer-tools/reineira-code): AI-assisted development environment for building Gates and Insurances; drops into VS Code, Cursor, Claude Code, JetBrains, Zed.
- [Platform Modules](https://docs.reineira.xyz/developer-tools/platform-modules): Plug-and-play backend and React app starters for ReineiraOS ventures.

## Learn

- [Mental Model](https://docs.reineira.xyz/learn/mental-model): Four primitives — Escrow, Gate, Insurance, Operator.
- [Architecture](https://docs.reineira.xyz/learn/architecture): System architecture and component overview.
- [Privacy Model](https://docs.reineira.xyz/learn/privacy-model): How FHE encryption protects user data on-chain.
- [Security](https://docs.reineira.xyz/learn/security): Security assumptions, threat model, and audit results.
- [Resilience & Recovery](https://docs.reineira.xyz/learn/resilience): Fault tolerance, recovery mechanisms, and disaster scenarios.
- [Economics & Incentives](https://docs.reineira.xyz/learn/economics): Fee structures, rewards, and protocol economics.

## Build

- [Escrow Lifecycle](https://docs.reineira.xyz/build/escrow-lifecycle): Create, fund, verify, and settle an Escrow — the full state machine.
- [Condition Resolvers](https://docs.reineira.xyz/build/condition-resolvers): Custom verification logic that controls when an Escrow releases funds.
- [Underwriter Policies](https://docs.reineira.xyz/build/underwriter-policies): Define and deploy risk evaluation and dispute resolution policies.
- [Recourse Pools](https://docs.reineira.xyz/build/recourse-pools): Liquidity pools backing Recourse coverage.
- [Cross-Chain Settlement](https://docs.reineira.xyz/build/cross-chain): Settle Escrows across EVM-compatible chains via Circle CCTP V2.
- [Atlas-Deployed L3s](https://docs.reineira.xyz/build/atlas-l3): Self-deploy ReineiraOS on your own L3 via Atlas; operator-routed liquidity over the native rollup bridge.
- [Gas & Performance](https://docs.reineira.xyz/build/gas-performance): Optimization strategies for FHE-heavy operations.

## Operate

- [Operator Network](https://docs.reineira.xyz/operate/operator-network): The coordinator layer — task distribution and relay routing.
- [Run an Operator](https://docs.reineira.xyz/operate/run-operator): Set up and run an operator node.

## Research & R&D

- [Cryptographic Foundations](https://docs.reineira.xyz/research/cryptographic-foundations): TFHE/CoFHE substrate, encrypted types, homomorphic costs, and the silent-failure pattern.
- [Open Problems](https://docs.reineira.xyz/research/open-problems): Every numbered Open Problem from the whitepaper (§14.3).
- [Research Previews](https://docs.reineira.xyz/research/research-previews): Exploratory directions — including encrypted inference — with no committed scope.
- [Agentic Composition (Preview)](https://docs.reineira.xyz/research/agentic-composition): The deferred agentic / AI-execution layer — not part of v1.0 RSS conformance.

## API Reference

- [Contracts](https://docs.reineira.xyz/reference/contracts): Deployed contract addresses and ABIs.
- [SDK](https://docs.reineira.xyz/reference/sdk): TypeScript/JavaScript SDK for building on ReineiraOS — `@reineira-os/sdk`.
- [Escrow Module](https://docs.reineira.xyz/reference/escrow-module): Complete Escrow module API reference.
- [Recourse Module](https://docs.reineira.xyz/reference/recourse-module): Complete Recourse module API reference.
- [MCP Server](https://docs.reineira.xyz/reference/mcp-server): AI assistant access to docs, contracts, and interfaces via the Model Context Protocol.

## Optional

- [Landing](https://reineira.xyz): Product overview, posture, and ecosystem.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/ReineiraOS): SDK + protocol source.
